{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1314 would require schools to notify parents within three days if their child begins a gender transition at school.",
    "Studies are clear that trans minors do better with parental involvement.",
    "Gender dysphoria is a serious issue, and parents need to be aware of the associated mental health risks trans minors face.",
